meta.purpose: PPT arrow asset pack 07 selected relationship arrows: orthogonal connector routes, hub exchange topology, and cycle feedback routes for connector-heavy architecture and process pages.
meta.license_policy: Self-made PPT assets; see assets/ppt_arrow_pack7_sources/README.md and index.csv.
meta.selection_policy: Only connector and relationship-oriented categories from source pack 07 are imported; main-chain, chevron, flat primitive, and ghost backbone categories remain outside the runtime library.

sources.summary: Pick for orthogonal connector routes, branch lines, parallel routes, route turns, or return-style module connections; tags: connector, route, branch, arrow line. Skip for hub-spoke topology (use pptpack7_hub_exchange_topology_001).
